Uses of Interface
org.apache.juneau.http.HttpPart

Packages that use HttpPart
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.http
HTTP Part Annotations
org.apache.juneau.http.part
Next-generation HTTP part (query/form/path) implementations.
org.apache.juneau.rest.client
Next-generation REST client — transport-agnostic HTTP client built on Juneau's serialization stack.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.httppart
REST HTTP Parts

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static HttpPart
    HttpParts.part(String name, String value)
    Creates an HttpPart with an eager string value.
    static HttpPart
    HttpParts.part(String name, Supplier<String> valueSupplier)
    Creates an HttpPart with a lazy value supplier.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static PartList
    HttpBodies.formBody(HttpPart... parts)
    Creates a URL-encoded form body from the given parts.
    static PartList
    HttpParts.partList(HttpPart... parts)
    Creates a PartList from the given parts.

  • Uses of HttpPart in org.apache.juneau.http.part

    Classes in org.apache.juneau.http.part that implement HttpPart
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    HttpBooleanPart
    An HttpPart whose value is a boolean.
    class 
    HttpCsvArrayPart
    An HttpPart whose value is a comma-delimited list of strings.
    class 
    HttpDatePart
    An HttpPart whose value is an ISO-8601 date-time.
    class 
    HttpIntegerPart
    An HttpPart whose value is an integer.
    class 
    HttpLongPart
    An HttpPart whose value is a long integer.
    class 
    HttpPartBean
    Root concrete implementation of HttpPart.
    class 
    HttpStringPart
    An HttpPart whose value is a string.
    class 
    HttpUriPart
    An HttpPart whose value is a URI.
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.http.part that return HttpPart
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    HttpPart[]
    HttpPartList.getAll()
    Returns all parts in this list as a typed array.
    HttpPart
    HttpPartList.getFirst(String name)
    Returns the first part with the given name, or null if absent.
    HttpPart
    PartList.getFirst(String name)
    Returns the first part with the given name (case-sensitive), or null if absent.
    HttpPart
    HttpPartList.getLast(String name)
    Returns the last part with the given name, or null if absent.
    HttpPart[]
    HttpPartList.toPartArray()
    Returns the parts in this list as a typed array.
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.http.part that return types with arguments of type HttpPart
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<HttpPart>
    HttpPartList.getAll(String name)
    Returns all parts with the given name in insertion order.
    List<HttpPart>
    PartList.getParts()
    Returns the parts in this list.
    Iterator<HttpPart>
    PartList.iterator()
     
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.http.part with parameters of type HttpPart
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    HttpPartList
    HttpPartList.append(HttpPart value)
    Appends the given part.
    HttpPartList
    HttpPartList.append(HttpPart... values)
    Appends the given parts in order.
    static HttpPartList
    HttpPartList.of(HttpPart... parts)
    Creates a new HttpPartList initialized with the given parts.
    static PartList
    PartList.of(HttpPart... parts)
    Creates a PartList from the given parts.
    HttpPartList
    HttpPartList.set(HttpPart value)
    Sets the given part, replacing any prior entry with the same name.
    HttpPartList
    HttpPartList.set(HttpPart... values)
    Sets the given parts, each replacing any prior entry with the same name.
    HttpPartList
    HttpPartList.setDefault(HttpPart value)
    Sets the given part as a default.
    HttpPartList
    HttpPartList.setDefault(HttpPart... values)
    Sets the given parts as defaults, in order.
    Method parameters in org.apache.juneau.http.part with type arguments of type HttpPart
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    HttpPartList
    HttpPartList.append(List<HttpPart> values)
    Appends the given parts in order.
    HttpPartList
    HttpPartList.forEach(String name, Consumer<HttpPart> action)
    Performs an action on each part whose name matches.
    static HttpPartList
    HttpPartList.of(List<HttpPart> parts)
    Creates a new HttpPartList initialized with the given parts.
    static PartList
    PartList.of(List<HttpPart> parts)
    Creates a PartList from the given list of parts.

  • Uses of HttpPart in org.apache.juneau.rest.client

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.rest.client with parameters of type HttpPart
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    RestRequest
    RestRequest.formData(HttpPart... value)
    Adds form fields (for application/x-www-form-urlencoded bodies).
    RestRequest
    RestRequest.pathData(HttpPart... value)
    Adds path variable substitutions for URI templates (e.g. replaces {id} in the URL).
    RestClient.Builder
    RestClient.Builder.queryData(HttpPart... value)
    Adds default query parameters appended to every request URL.
    RestRequest
    RestRequest.queryData(HttpPart... value)
    Adds query parameters.

    Class
    Description
    class 
    RequestFormParam
    Represents a single form-data parameter on an HTTP request.
    class 
    RequestPathParam
    Represents a single path parameter on an HTTP request.
    class 
    RequestQueryParam
    Represents a single query parameter on an HTTP request.
